updates.installedDeb: Installed the <deb>.deb</deb> manually? Add the apt repository for automatic updates (instructions at <url>grimoiremods.com/download</url>).

experimental.description: These features are still in development and may be incomplete or buggy.
experimental.statsDashboardDescription: Track your performance with data from the Deadlock Stats API.
experimental.crosshairDesignerDescription: Create custom crosshairs with a live preview.
experimental.socialDescription: Sign in with Steam to publish profiles and browse uploads from other players in Discover.

support.description: Found a bug or have a feature request? File an issue on GitHub or drop into our Discord.
support.bugReportDescription: Describe what went wrong, generate a sanitized report, then paste it into Discord or a GitHub issue. The report bundles app and OS info plus the tail of your log; home paths, Steam IDs, bearer tokens, and emails are stripped before it leaves the app.
support.includeFullLog: Include full log (up to 5 MB; Discord auto-attaches as a file)
support.reviewBeforeSharing: Review before sharing. Nothing is sent automatically.

setupWizard.resetResult: Setup wizard will show on next launch.
setupWizard.title: Reset Setup Wizard
setupWizard.description: Show the first-run setup wizard again on next app launch.
setupWizard.confirmMessage: The first-run setup wizard will appear the next time you launch the app. Your settings and installed mods are not affected.

cache.previewDescription: 3D model stills, hero portraits, and locker card thumbnails. These rebuild automatically from your installed mods when next viewed. Your installed mods are not affected.
cache.wipeMessage: Removes cached mod metadata and sync state. Browse re-syncs from GameBanana next time. Installed mods are not affected.
cache.clearPreviewMessage: Deletes cached preview images to reclaim disk. They regenerate when you next view them. Installed mods are not affected.

autoexec.title: Autoexec Configuration
autoexec.description: Ensure autoexec.cfg exists for crosshairs and commands.

toggles.hideOutdated: Hide Browse mods older than the current game version.
toggles.expandLocker: Start Locker list view with hero cards expanded.
toggles.switchVariants: Installing a new variant disables the old one. Off keeps both active. Updates always replace the old file.
toggles.enableAfterDownload: Enable mods as soon as they finish downloading. Stays disabled if no slot is free.
toggles.confirmProfileUpdate: Confirm before overwriting a profile's saved mods. Off overwrites immediately.
toggles.ignoreConflicts: Hide all conflicts from the Conflicts page. Off shows them.
toggles.discordRpc: Show your current Grimoire activity on your Discord profile. Talks only to your local Discord app and sends nothing to Grimoire.
toggles.contributeSalts: Share the replay keys Steam already caches for matches you view in-game. Sends only the match id, server cluster, and two download keys: no account id, no username, nothing about you or your mods.
toggles.fixUnknown: Match unknown local VPKs against GameBanana to recover names and thumbnails. May hit rate limits on large libraries.
toggles.deadworks: Add a Servers tab to browse and join Deadworks community servers. Required content downloads before connecting.
toggles.performanceConfig: One-click fps boost using Sqooky's community preset. Mods keep working. Remove any time.
toggles.foundry: Browse the game's own asset catalog (textures, icons, heroes) built offline from your installed game files. Swap and forge tools coming soon.

toggles.staticGap: Keep the gap fixed. Off lets it expand with weapon spread (not shown in preview).

unknown.fixHiddenHint: Fix unknown is hidden. Right-click to bring it back.
unknown.fixButtonHint: Find GameBanana matches or add custom metadata for unknown local mods. Right-click to hide this button.
unknown.noCachedMatch: No cached match found. Queued for online search.
unknown.missingMetadata: Matched mod is missing GameBanana metadata
unknown.retryAllHint: Retry every unknown mod that previously had no match
unknown.searchAllHint: Auto-detect every unknown mod that has not already been checked (heavy, may hit rate limits)
unknown.searchAllConfirmMessage_one: Auto-detect scans GameBanana for {{count}} mod. This can hit GameBanana rate limits. Searching manually (per mod) is faster and lighter.
unknown.searchAllConfirmMessage_other: Auto-detect scans GameBanana for {{count}} mods. This can hit GameBanana rate limits. Searching manually (per mod) is faster and lighter.
unknown.cantFindHint: Can't find it on GameBanana? Save it with a custom name instead.
unknown.autoDetectWarning: Auto-detect downloads candidate archives from GameBanana and compares them byte-for-byte. It is slow and can hit GameBanana rate limits, especially when fixing many mods at once. The manual search above is faster and lighter.
unknown.noArchiveMatched: No GameBanana archive matched this local VPK by CRC-32.
unknown.autoDetectPrompt: Run a byte-for-byte search against GameBanana.
unknown.autoDetectOff: Auto-detect is off. Enable it under Settings (Experimental Features) if you want to try it, but the manual search above is the recommended path.
unknown.manualSearchIntro: <lead>Find it on GameBanana and link it.</lead> Results update as you type, or open GameBanana (or the Browse tab) side by side to find the mod, then search for it here. Linking tags this exact file: nothing is re-downloaded. Use the <banana></banana> button on any result to open it on GameBanana and download there directly.
unknown.noResults: No results. Try a different name or section.
unknown.showingSample: Showing a sample. The full tree loads when expanded.
unknown.noFilePaths: No file paths found in this VPK.

updateAll.description: Re-download every mod flagged with an available update. Each one's enabled state will be restored after the install finishes. Downloads run one at a time and may take a while.

delete.bulkMessage: Delete <name>{{name}}</name>? This removes every VPK in the selection and cannot be undone.
delete.groupMessage_one: Delete all {{count}} file from <name>{{name}}</name>? This removes every VPK in the group. To keep some, cancel and use the file picker instead.
delete.groupMessage_other: Delete all {{count}} files from <name>{{name}}</name>? This removes every VPK in the group. To keep some, cancel and use the file picker instead.
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete <name>{{name}}</name>? This action cannot be undone.

colors.intro: Repaint {{hero}}'s ability effects (particles, projectiles, and the ult body). Pick a single color, a rainbow, a gradient, or a trippy pattern: one pick is active at a time.
colors.sweepSpectrum: sweep the spectrum over each effect's lifetime
colors.sweepGradient: sweep the gradient over each effect's lifetime
colors.prismDescription: Prism spreads {{hero}}'s existing ability colors across a rainbow instead of one hue. Use the sliders above to rotate the spectrum and tune its saturation / brightness. Animated adds a moving sweep on the showy effects (glow, beams, trails).
colors.gradientDescription: Gradient spreads {{hero}}'s ability colors over a chosen ramp instead of the full rainbow. Pick a preset or Custom (a hue per stop); the sliders above rotate and tune it.
colors.trippyDescription: Trippy paints {{hero}}'s ability particles with a flowing procedural pattern. The pattern strength and phase are above; Animation sets how the particles move in game (Off bakes a still paint). Gun FX targets the weapon's effect particles (muzzle, tracers, impacts), not its skin (that's the Body + Gun tab). This shares the one-per-hero slot, so it replaces any color, rainbow, or gradient.
colors.swatchAnimationHint: The swatch above previews the pattern and its scroll speed (set by Animation strength). Sweep, Loop, and Cycle differ in how particles animate their color in game, which a texture swatch can't show.
colors.bakingHint: Baking the recolor. The first time for a given pick can take up to a minute (it re-encodes every effect texture); the same pick is instant after that.
colors.restartHint: Restart Deadlock for this change to take effect (addons mount at game start).
colors.savedHint: Saved. This pick mounts the next time you Launch Modded.

sounds.intro: Your tagged sound mods for {{hero}}, grouped by the ability each one changes. Pick one source per ability and it's isolated into a single Locker-managed sound that wins over your other mods; pick the applied source again to revert. Tune the applied source's volume and pitch with the sliders.
sounds.restartHint: Restart Deadlock for these sound changes to take effect (addons mount at game start).
sounds.savedHint: Saved. These sound changes mount the next time you Launch Modded.
sounds.noSoundModForAbility: No sound mod for this ability.
sounds.otherSoundsDescription: Voice lines and sounds not tied to a single ability. These toggle the whole mod on or off.
sounds.noSoundModsTagged: No sound mods tagged for this hero yet. Tag one from Installed (multi-select then Tag).

cards.intro: Card art found in your installed mods. Each mod may ship several portrait variants; click a card to apply that mod's full set for {{hero}}, and click the applied card again to revert to default.
cards.noCardArt: No card art found in your installed mods for {{hero}}.
cards.uploadInstructions: Click a slot to choose an image and crop it to that variant's exact size. Fill only the variants you want to change, then apply. Unfilled variants stay default.
cards.exportVpkTitle: Save this custom card as a standalone .vpk file
cards.chooseImageForCard: Choose an image for the {{variant}} card

trippy.description: Paint {{hero}}'s body and gun textures with a flowing procedural pattern: the paint scrolls in game. This composes with anything applied on the Abilities surface.
trippy.baking: Baking the paint. The first time for a given combination can take a while (it re-encodes the affected textures); the same combination is instant after that.
trippy.restartRequired: Restart Deadlock for this change to take effect (addons mount at game start).
trippy.saved: Saved. This paint mounts the next time you Launch Modded.

trippyPattern.swatchUnavailable: Live swatch unavailable (vpkmerge binary missing or too old).

effects.unavailable: Effects aren't available for {{hero}} yet (no pinned recipe in the bundled vpkmerge). More heroes are coming.

skins.loadOrderHint: Drag to set which skin wins when two cover the same files. Top loads first.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete mod?
deleteConfirm.body: Permanently delete "{{name}}" and its files? This cannot be undone.

crop.imageLoadFailed: That image could not be loaded. Try a different PNG or JPG.
crop.noCanvasContext: Could not render the crop (no 2D canvas context).
crop.title: Crop {{variant}} card
crop.upscaleWarning: Source is {{sourceWidth}} x {{sourceHeight}}, smaller than the {{targetWidth}} x {{targetHeight}} target, so it will be upscaled and may look soft.
crop.instructions: Drag to reposition, scroll or use the slider to zoom. The frame is locked to the card's aspect so the result is not stretched.
crop.boxHint: Drag the box to move it, drag a corner to resize. The selection is locked to the surface's shape.

pose.cannotPose: This hero can't be posed in 3D yet.

create.title: Create New Profile
create.placeholder: Enter profile name, e.g. Competitive, Casual

import.title: Import a portable profile from a share code or file

empty.title: No Profiles Yet
empty.noProfiles: Create a profile to save your current mod setup.

actions.updateTitle: Overwrite this profile with your current mods

snapshots.snapshotNowTitle: Capture your current installed mods now. Use this before experimenting.
snapshots.tooltip: Snapshots are automatic recovery points taken before updates or profile applies.
snapshots.collapsedEmpty: Automatic recovery points captured before updates or profile applies. None yet - one will appear here the next time you run either.
snapshots.expandedEmpty: Grimoire takes a snapshot of your installed mod set automatically before each mod update and before applying a profile. Restore re-downloads those mods from GameBanana, so a bad update or wrong profile can be rolled back. Snapshots store only mod IDs, not VPK files, so disk cost stays tiny. You can also capture one manually before experimenting.

explanation.preUpdate: Captured before a mod update changed your installed set.
explanation.preApplyProfile: Captured before applying a profile changed your installed set.
explanation.manual: Captured manually from the Profiles page.

snapshots.restoreTitle: Opens the import dialog with this snapshot preloaded

confirm.updateMessage: Overwrite {{name}} with your currently enabled mods? The profile's saved mod list will be replaced and can't be undone. To load this profile onto your install instead, use Apply. You can turn this prompt off in Settings -> Preferences.
confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSnapshotMessage: Delete this recovery snapshot? You won't be able to restore from it later.
confirm.deleteSelectedSnapshotsMessage_one: Delete {{count}} snapshot? Your installed mods are unaffected. You won't be able to restore from the deleted snapshot later.
confirm.deleteSelectedSnapshotsMessage_other: Delete {{count}} snapshots? Your installed mods are unaffected. You won't be able to restore from the deleted snapshots later.

account.deleteMessage: Permanently deletes your account, your likes, and your published profiles from Discover. People who already imported them keep their copy.
account.signInPrompt: Sign in with Steam to publish profiles and like ones you find. Importing works without an account.
account.safeStorageUnencrypted: Electron safeStorage is not reporting an encrypted OS keychain backend to Grimoire.
account.opensSteamInBrowser: Opens Steam in your browser. Grimoire never sees your password.
account.finishSigningIn: Finish signing in with Steam in your browser. This page will update automatically when you're done.

publish.tosBody: Publishing makes this profile's title, description, and the list of GameBanana mods it references public on Discover. By continuing, you confirm the referenced mods comply with GameBanana's terms, you grant Grimoire permission to host this metadata, and you accept that profiles may be removed for community-guideline violations.

importProfile.fetchVariantsTitle: Fetch every mod's file list so you can swap to a different variant than the one pinned in the profile
importProfile.chooseDifferentVariant: Choose a different variant from this mod
importProfile.upgradedNotice: Original file no longer available, will use newest version

mergeMods.strictDescription: Stop if two mods touch the same file. Off lets the higher-priority mod win.
mergeMods.localNote: Local mods merge fine but aren't in the share code. Delete the disabled originals and they can't be recovered on unmerge.
mergeMods.title: Merge {{count}} mods
mergeMods.originalsStay: The originals stay on disk in the disabled folder so you can unmerge later.
mergeMods.localModTitle: Local mod: not in the unroll share code

mergedContents.sourcesStayOnDisk: Sources stay on disk in the disabled folder. Unmerge restores them; the share code captures the list for re-downloading from GameBanana on another machine.
mergedContents.extractTitle: Extract: pull this out as its own mod

multiVpk.uncheckHint: Uncheck any you don't want to install.
multiVpk.title: Multiple VPKs in archive

welcome.autoexecExists: Existing autoexec.cfg found. Your settings stay intact.
welcome.autoDetectFailed: Auto-detect failed. Browse to your Steam library:
welcome.title: Welcome to Grimoire
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your mod manager
welcome.gameinfoNeedsConfig: gameinfo.gi needs to be configured for mods to load.
welcome.createAutoexecHint: Create autoexec.cfg for crosshairs and console commands.

sidebar.updateAvailableTitle: Update available. Click to view release notes.

tooltip.installed: Mods currently in your Deadlock addons folder.
tooltip.browse: Discover and download mods from GameBanana.
tooltip.discover: Browse and import profiles published by other Grimoire users.
tooltip.servers: Browse and join Deadworks community servers.
tooltip.locker: Active cosmetic skins, organized by hero.
tooltip.foundry: Browse the game's asset catalog: textures, icons, and heroes.
tooltip.autoexec: Console commands that run at game launch.
tooltip.conflicts: Mods that overwrite the same game files.
tooltip.profiles: Save and swap sets of enabled mods.

launch.noPath: Configure your Deadlock path in Settings first
launch.moddedStash: Restores stashed mods first, then launches Deadlock via Steam
launch.vanillaStash: A vanilla session is already active. Restore mods first.
launch.vanillaDefault: Temporarily stash mods, launch Deadlock via Steam, then auto-restore after the game starts

vanilla.collapsedTitle_one: Vanilla session active. {{count}} mod stashed. Click to restore now.
vanilla.collapsedTitle_other: Vanilla session active. {{count}} mods stashed. Click to restore now.

toast.restoreFailedRetry_one: Couldn't restore {{count}} mod. Make sure Deadlock is closed, then retry.
toast.restoreFailedRetry_other: Couldn't restore {{count}} mods. Make sure Deadlock is closed, then retry.
toast.restoreFailedRunning_one: Couldn't restore {{count}} mod. Is Deadlock still running?
toast.restoreFailedRunning_other: Couldn't restore {{count}} mods. Is Deadlock still running?
toast.stoppedRestoreFailed_one: Stopped Deadlock, but couldn't restore {{count}} mod.
toast.stoppedRestoreFailed_other: Stopped Deadlock, but couldn't restore {{count}} mods.

actions.enableDisabledTitle: Enable this mod (currently in your disabled folder)

filePicker.title: Choose a file to install for {{name}}
filePicker.heading: Choose a file to install

empty.configureGamePathBody: Set your Deadlock installation path in Settings (or enable dev mode) before downloading mods.

import.gamebananaCollectionHint: Import items from a collection URL
import.grimoireProfileHint: Share code or .modprofile.json from the Profiles tab

modDetails.outdatedWarning: This mod was last updated on {{date}} and may not be compatible with the current Deadlock version.

deleteFile.title: Delete installed file?
deleteFile.body: Delete <name>{{fileName}}</name> from your installed mods? This action cannot be undone.

updateModal.managedDistroTools: Update with your distro's tools: <arch>yay -Syu grimoire-bin</arch> on Arch, or <apt>sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade</apt> on Debian/Ubuntu.
updateModal.managedAptRepo: Installed the <deb>.deb</deb> manually? Add the apt repository for auto-updates: <url>grimoiremods.com/download</url>.
updateModal.downloadComplete: Download complete. Click Install & Restart to apply.
updateModal.noReleaseNotesForThisVersion: No release notes for this version.
updateModal.deliveredViaGithub: Updates are delivered automatically through GitHub Releases. Click Check for Updates to look now.

appUpdateBanner.restartToFinish: Restart to finish updating. Your mods and settings stay untouched.
appUpdateBanner.newerVersionReady: A newer version is ready. View the release notes and download it.
appUpdateBanner.hideBannerUntilNextLaunch: Hide update banner until next launch

layout.rateLimited: GameBanana is rate-limiting Grimoire. Pause a moment before retrying.

suspicious.title: Suspicious files detected
suspicious.body: <name>{{modName}}</name> contains files that aren't typical for a Deadlock mod:
suspicious.extractsNote: Grimoire only extracts .vpk files: these won't be installed even if you continue. Review the mod's GameBanana page if anything looks off.

variantPicker.updateAvailable: A newer version is available on GameBanana
variantPicker.moveFileUp: Move file up in load order
variantPicker.moveFileDown: Move file down in load order

header.description: Mod profiles published by other Grimoire users.
header.signInHint: Sign in to like and publish; importing works without an account.

signIn.opensSteamHint: Opens Steam in your browser. Grimoire never sees your password.
signIn.finishInBrowser: Finish signing in with Steam in your browser. The header will update when you're done.

publish.pickAndPublishTitle: Pick a local profile and publish it to Discover

error.title: Couldn't reach Grimoire Social
error.retryHint: Check your connection, then switch sort tabs to retry.

empty.title: No profiles here yet
empty.description: Be the first to publish: open Profiles, pick one, and click Publish to Discover.

performance.statusReadError: Could not read gameinfo.gi status. Check your Deadlock path in Settings.
performance.cardDescription: Sqooky's community fps preset (OptimizationLock), applied without touching your mods.
performance.credit: Map looks dark? Set in-game shadows to Medium or Low. Game updates wipe the config; Grimoire spots that here so you can reapply. By <sqooky>Sqooky</sqooky> and <contributors>contributors<extlink></extlink></contributors>. If it helps, <kofi>buy them a coffee</kofi>.

editor.title: Open gameinfo.gi with
editor.description: Pick the editor for config tweaks. Grimoire remembers this; the gear button next to Edit File switches it later.
editor.systemDefaultHint: Whatever your OS opens text files with

lockerOverrides.title: Locker Overrides
lockerOverrides.subtitle: Always-on cosmetics, separate from your mod load order and the 99-slot cap.
lockerOverrides.restartForSound: Restart Deadlock for sound changes to take effect (addons mount at game start).
lockerOverrides.addOrChange: Add or change in the Locker
